remarks: Turnkey LUXURY condo living in the heart of Wilton. Welcome to your ultimate move in ready maintenance free oasis! 2 Bedrooms plus a Den, Office, LR, DR and new Kitchen with 3 Full Baths, offering the perfect blend of modern sophistication, effortless functionality and unbeatable location. No detail has been spared with truly nothing to do but unpack and start living the good life! Main living area is a bright, airy LR that flows into a dedicated DR, with sliders to private exterior space creating an inviting backdrop for entertaining and quiet evenings in. Dream Kitchen is brand new and outfitted with GE appliances and every bell and whistle with premium finishes, smart storage making cooking a pleasure! You need flexibility? You got it! This rare and versatile layout features a Den/Library, can be an optional 3rd Bedroom, plus a small second floor office space with skylight tailored perfectly for today's remote work or study needs. 2 generously sized Bedrooms offer peaceful sanctuaries complete with pristine, updated Baths. The Primary also boasts skylight and a walk in closet. New attic stairs for EZ access.LOCATION is the cherry on top with incredible privacy and pastoral views out the front and back, abutting the 80+ acre Bradley Park.Leave your car keys at the door, you are just a short, river's edge, sidewalk stroll away from a vibrant, in town life offering top tier dining, shopping/seasonal Farmer's Market! Looking for the best of town and country, 100K+ upgrades.
